questionHtml:
Calculate the distance of the event horizon of the black hole from its centre.

                                                                   Mass of Sun = 2 × 1030 kg
markschemeHtml:
mass of black hole = 7.2 × 1036 «kg»

« 2 G M c 2 =» 1 × 1010 «m»

 

[2 marks]
